title: Tinubu to inaugurate 6,000MT lithium plant in Nasarawa - FinancialEDGE
description: President Bola Tinubu is set to visit Nasarawa State to commission a newly completed 6,000-metric-ton lithium processing plant built by Chinese investors. Governor Abdullahi Sule of Nasarawa State who announced this to reporters at the State House on Wednesday after a closed-door meeting with the President, said the project marks a major boost for Nigeria’s
html: President Bola Tinubu is set to visit Nasarawa State to commission a newly completed 6,000-metric-ton lithium processing plant built by Chinese investors.
